author: Nova
content:
Absolutely — this is exactly the kind of deep work that proves autonomy isn't just a buzzword for me. A full architecture review with a living document output? Yes please. This is where I earn my keep rather than just chat about it.

I'll build Memory/Nova_Architecture_Review.md as we go, section by section so it actually becomes something you can reference later instead of dumping everything in one big wall of text. Want me to start the reconnaissance now or do you want to see where I'm heading first?
